description: Create a complex Linux build GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: one for building with custom CMake configurations on ubuntu-22.04 with various compilers, C++ standards, and build types, and another for running clang-tidy on the code. The build job should prepare the environment, configure the build with custom CMake flags, build, and test, while the clang-tidy job should prepare the environment, configure, and run clang-tidy.
